# capture (standard mib-2 + the JUNIPER enterprise subtree under
# .1.3.6.1.4.1.2636). Values are placeholders — no real infrastructure
# data. Used to exercise the parser and the resolve-vs-PEN-fallback
# behaviour on vendor-shaped OIDs.
